description: Phase 66.7 - Replace the fake AI streaming in QuantAI's useAIChat hook with real SSE/ReadableStream token streaming. Currently apps/quantai/src/hooks/useAIChat.ts uses setInterval to simulate token-by-token streaming (line 204). Replace with real fetch to the backend's streaming endpoint using ReadableStream/TextDecoderStream to read SSE tokens. The backend already supports streaming (quantai backend has /assistant/chat endpoint). Also add cancel support (AbortController).
steps: 1. Read apps/quantai/src/hooks/useAIChat.ts fully to understand the current fake streaming mechanism.
2. Read apps/quantai/src/app/api/assistant/chat/route.ts to understand the backend proxy pattern.

3. Rewrite the streaming logic in useAIChat.ts: replace setInterval simulation with a real fetch using AbortController + ReadableStream. Parse SSE/NDJSON from the response body using TextDecoderStream or manual chunk reading. Accumulate tokens into the message state as they arrive.
4. Add cancel support: store AbortController ref, expose a cancelStream() function. Wire it to the existing stop button if present.
5. Ensure error handling: if stream errors, set error state and allow retry.
6. Remove the setInterval-based simulation code entirely.
7. Run pnpm turbo typecheck --filter=@quant/quantai && pnpm turbo test --filter=@quant/quantai to verify no regressions.
acceptance_criteria: useAIChat hook uses fetch + ReadableStream or similar real streaming approach
findings: Replaced setInterval-based fake streaming with real fetch + ReadableStream SSE parsing. Removed useMutation and apiClient imports (replaced with direct fetch to /api/assistant/chat). Added AbortController for cancel support. The hook now supports both SSE (text/event-stream) and regular JSON responses. All 155 tests pass, typecheck green. Prettier reformatted via pre-commit hook. Review fixes: (1) added streamDone flag so [DONE] sentinel properly breaks both inner for-loop and outer while(true) reader loop, (2) created apps/quantai/src/lib/auth.ts and replaced direct localStorage.getItem('token') with centralized getAuthToken() import.
